'''thonadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:biacromial|biacromial]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-n-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:biacromial|biacromial]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thonadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonadhithi|thonadhithi]] || [[word:thonadhiji|thonadhiji]] || [[word:thonadhishi|thonadhishi]] || [[word:thonadhiki|thonadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonadhuthuthu|thonadhuthuthu]] || [[word:thonadhujuju|thonadhujuju]] || [[word:thonadhushushu|thonadhushushu]] || [[word:thonadhukuku|thonadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhuthu|thonadhuthu]] || [[word:thonadhuju|thonadhuju]] || [[word:thonadhushu|thonadhushu]] || [[word:thonadhuku|thonadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhufthuf|thonadhufthuf]] || [[word:thonadhufjuf|thonadhufjuf]] || [[word:thonadhufshuf|thonadhufshuf]] || [[word:thonadhufkuf|thonadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonadhethe|thonadhethe]] || [[word:thonadheje|thonadheje]] || [[word:thonadheshe|thonadheshe]] || [[word:thonadheke|thonadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonadhothotho|thonadhothotho]] || [[word:thonadhojojo|thonadhojojo]] || [[word:thonadhoshosho|thonadhoshosho]] || [[word:thonadhokoko|thonadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhotho|thonadhotho]] || [[word:thonadhojo|thonadhojo]] || [[word:thonadhosho|thonadhosho]] || [[word:thonadhoko|thonadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhofthof|thonadhofthof]] || [[word:thonadhofjof|thonadhofjof]] || [[word:thonadhofshof|thonadhofshof]] || [[word:thonadhofkof|thonadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf|thonadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thonadhĂŠthĂŠ|thonadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:thonadhĂŠjĂŠ|thonadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:thonadhĂŠshĂŠ|thonadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:thonadhĂŠkĂŠ|thonadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thonadhathatha|thonadhathatha]] || [[word:thonadhajaja|thonadhajaja]] || [[word:thonadhashasha|thonadhashasha]] || [[word:thonadhakaka|thonadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadhatha|thonadhatha]] || [[word:thonadhaja|thonadhaja]] || [[word:thonadhasha|thonadhasha]] || [[word:thonadhaka|thonadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadhafthaf|thonadhafthaf]] || [[word:thonadhafjaf|thonadhafjaf]] || [[word:thonadhafshaf|thonadhafshaf]] || [[word:thonadhafkaf|thonadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:thonadhasha|thonadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonadhshĂ«sha|thonadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonadhrosha|thonadhrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonadhmusha|thonadhmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonadhyasha|thonadhyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonadhnkshĂ«sha|gothonadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonadhnkrosha|gothonadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonadhnkmusha|gothonadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonadhnkyasha|gothonadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:thonanadhasha|thonanadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonanadhshĂ«sha|thonanadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonanadhrosha|thonanadhrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonanadhmusha|thonanadhmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonanadhyasha|thonanadhyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonanadhnkshĂ«sha|gothonanadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonanadhnkrosha|gothonanadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonanadhnkmusha|gothonanadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonanadhnkyasha|gothonanadhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:thenĂŠdhasha|thenĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thenĂŠdhshĂ«sha|thenĂŠdhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thenĂŠdhrosha|thenĂŠdhrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thenĂŠdhmusha|thenĂŠdhmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thenĂŠdhyasha|thenĂŠdhyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha|gothenĂŠdhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothenĂŠdhnkrosha|gothenĂŠdhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothenĂŠdhnkmusha|gothenĂŠdhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothenĂŠdhnkyasha|gothenĂŠdhnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:thonfadhasha|thonfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:thonfadhshĂ«sha|thonfadhshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:thonfadhrosha|thonfadhrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:thonfadhmusha|thonfadhmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:thonfadhyasha|thonfadhyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothonfadhnkshĂ«sha|gothonfadhnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gothonfadhnkrosha|gothonfadhnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothonfadhnkmusha|gothonfadhnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gothonfadhnkyasha|gothonfadhnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
